parsed_review.summary: CP00-450 is a descriptor-only settlement-core closeout pack (Risk C, 150 units, RP14.P08.M08.S20-RP14.P09.M07.S09) that closes RP14.P08 and opens the RP14.P09 foundation. The review verifies the pack's claim is honestly scoped: command-evidence, manifest, and plan all set production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / implementation_layer=descriptor, with the only positive claim being the descriptor-verified flag (settlement_core_p08_closeout_p09_foundation_descriptor_verified). That claim is fully supported. The CP450 pack binding (registry.js:409-424) matches the prompt baseline on pack_id, risk_class C, unit_count 150, range, upstream CP00-449, next CP00-451, and next_subphase RP14.P09.M07.S10. CP450 requirements (registry.js:2196-2277) reproduce the prompt's deliverable_distribution {implementation:76, hermes_evidence:21, claude_review:22, test:8, security_audit:16, ui:7} and micro_title_distribution exactly, and phase/micro-phase counts sum to 150. The service descriptor (service.js:3039-3158) freezes every no-write/no-real-data flag to false and sets claude_is_final_approval=false with human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true. Validators (validators.js:4335-4502) enforce coverage, descriptor-only rows, no-write attestation (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false), and authority boundaries; three dedicated tests (model.test.js:1647-1705) assert these. The contract JSON, validate-rp14 script, and closeout-pack-plan all pin CP00-450 consistently with deviation_from_plan=false. No write/db/fetch/runtime patterns exist in source. Review-hardening boundaries hold: auth preflight passed (exit 0, well-formed JSON), forbidden_tools_present=false, Claude remained read-only and non-final-approver, and Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence/receipts (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). raw-output.json and review-receipt.json are the outputs of this run and are correctly not yet present. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; the pack may proceed to its post-review gated closeout, which remains subject to human final approval for any enterprise-trust claim.
